diagnosis.final_diagnosis: severe mitral valve regurgitation due to mitral valve prolapse secondary to tendon rupture
diagnosis.diagnostic_reasoning: The diagnosis was based on echocardiography findings revealing mitral valve prolapse on the medial side of the posterior mitral leaflet due to tendon rupture, with quantitative Doppler echocardiography indicating severe mitral regurgitation. Additional imaging (CT and MRI) confirmed mesocardia, which complicated the surgical approach but was not a differential diagnosis for the mitral valve condition.
